tags.name: `mc-list`
tags.description:
Purpose: Display a list of items for user selection
Category: Content Display, Navigation
When to use: When you need to present a list of choices to the user or allow to display navigation menus
When not to use: When you have a single option or a different selection method.
Works with components: mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-drawer, mc-dropdown, mc-list-item, mc-menu, mc-modal, mc-side-nav, mc-tab, mc-top-bar
Alternative component names: Option List, Selection List, Menu List, Navigation Menu

Events:

  * `listchange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a list item is interacted.

  * `listitemsloaded` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when the list items are loaded.

  * `focuschange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a list item receives focus.

  * `scroll` {`Event`} - Dispatched when the list is scrolled.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where the content of the list goes, including list items or dividers.

Attributes:

  * `listsearch` {`boolean`} - 

  * `filtertype` {`IMcListFilterType`} - 

  * `disablehandlemousemove` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hasactionslots` {`boolean`} - 

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - 

  * `disablecircularkeynav` {`boolean`} - True if the circular key navigation should be disabled,
meaning that when the key nav reaches the very top or bottom
it stops there and wll no longer continue to the other end.

  * `disablesetfocus` {boolean} - True if the focus should not be handled internally in the list.
This is useful when the list is used in a typeahead.
In this case the focus is handled by the typeahead.
The list will still fire the onfocus and onblur events.

  * `scrolltofocused` {`boolean`} - True if the list scrolls to the focused item on .focus() invocation.

  * `mousemovevisiblearea` {`MouseMoveVisibleArea | null`} - If list is scrollable, get bounding box of dropdown

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - The fit.

  * `keynavigationtype` {`McListKeyNavigationType`} - The key navigation type.

  * `noborder` {`boolean`} - If true, removes the border.

  * `role` {`McListRole`} - Aria role.

  * `value` - The value.

  * `width` {`Width`} - The width.

  * `type` {`ListTypes`} - The type.

  * `scrollablecontainer` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - Used internally to set focus on the list when in popovers, or scrollable containers.

  * `matchlabelonly` {`boolean`} - Specifies if internal or custom filter function should match and filter the results in the label text only based on the typed text.
Match will not apply to sublabel or value of the data item.

  * `listsearchplaceholder` {`string`} - The placeholder text for the list search input when listsearch is enabled.

  * `data` {`IMcListDataItem[] | null | undefined`} - The data to be displayed in the list. It is an array of objects`<IMcListDataItem>`

Properties:

  * `scrollToSelectedValue` {`boolean`} - 

  * `scrollSelectedIntoView` {`boolean`} - When true, scroll selected item into view when clicked/selected by user

  * `labelSelector` {`string`} - 

  * `smoothScroll` {`boolean`} - 

  * `listSearchValue` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `items` {`(IMcListItem | IMcInput)[] | undefined`} - 

  * `allItems` {`IMcListItem[] | undefined`} - 

  * `headingGroups` {`Map<HTMLElement, IMcListItem[]>`} - 

  * `currentItem` {`IMcListItem | undefined`} - 

  * `focusedItem` {`IMcListItem | null | undefined`} - 

  * `lastFocusedItem` {`HTMLElement | IMcListItem | null | undefined`} - 

  * `hoveredItem` {`IMcListItem | null | undefined`} - 

  * `keyboardNavigationActive` {`boolean`} - 

  * `slottedListItems` {`IMcListItem[] | undefined`} - 

  * `listsearch` {`boolean`} - 

  * `filtertype` {`IMcListFilterType`} - 

  * `disablehandlemousemove` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hasactionslots` {`boolean`} - 

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - 

  * `disablecircularkeynav` {`boolean`} - True if the circular key navigation should be disabled,
meaning that when the key nav reaches the very top or bottom
it stops there and wll no longer continue to the other end.

  * `disablesetfocus` {boolean} - True if the focus should not be handled internally in the list.
This is useful when the list is used in a typeahead.
In this case the focus is handled by the typeahead.
The list will still fire the onfocus and onblur events.

  * `scrolltofocused` {`boolean`} - True if the list scrolls to the focused item on .focus() invocation.

  * `list` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - The inner list element.

  * `mousemovevisiblearea` {`MouseMoveVisibleArea | null`} - If list is scrollable, get bounding box of dropdown

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - The fit.

  * `keynavigationtype` {`McListKeyNavigationType`} - The key navigation type.

  * `noborder` {`boolean`} - If true, removes the border.

  * `role` {`McListRole`} - Aria role.

  * `value` - The value.

  * `width` {`Width`} - The width.

  * `type` {`ListTypes`} - The type.

  * `scrollablecontainer` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - Used internally to set focus on the list when in popovers, or scrollable containers.

  * `setFocusedItem` - Sets the focus on the supplied item.

  * `handleKeyDown` - 

  * `listSearchInput` {`HTMLInputElement`} - 

  * `clearListSearch` - Clears the list search input and resets all items to visible

  * `clearFocusedItem` - Clears the currently focused item to reset navigation state

  * `customfilter` - Custom filter function to be used to filter the list items instead of using the build-in filter function.
The internal filter function matches any text at any position in the item's text content.
It will be called with the item text and the search value and should return an array of strings.

  * `matchlabelonly` {`boolean`} - Specifies if internal or custom filter function should match and filter the results in the label text only based on the typed text.
Match will not apply to sublabel or value of the data item.

  * `listsearchplaceholder` {`string`} - The placeholder text for the list search input when listsearch is enabled.

  * `data` {`IMcListDataItem[] | null | undefined`} - The data to be displayed in the list. It is an array of objects`<IMcListDataItem>`
